title: Shared embedded Address reused by Customer and Vendor
prompt: Create MyApp.Shared.Address as an embedded_schema with fields street, city, postal_code, country (all required in its own validate_changeset/2). Then create MyApp.CRM.Customer and MyApp.Inventory.Vendor, each embedding the same Shared.Address as their primary_address via embeds_one. Write Address to lib/my_app/shared/address.ex, Customer to lib/my_app/crm/customer.ex, Vendor to lib/my_app/inventory/vendor.ex.
tier_rationale: Requires factoring a reusable embedded schema across two contexts. Sonnet often creates two near-duplicate embedded schemas.
